title: gymnogramma plantaginea
intro: Gymnogramma plantaginea, also known as the Gymnogramma fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae, native to Africa and Asia. Traditionally, Gymnogramma plantaginea has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gymnogramma plantaginea include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving fever. In herbal preparations, Gymnogramma plantaginea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
